items.name: op_trace
items.description: OpTrace is a desktop EVM step debugger built with Tauri 2 + React 19 + Rust + REVM. It replays any Ethereum transaction opcode-by-opcode, letting you inspect the full execution state at every step — stack, memory, storage, logs, call tree, and more.
